_notes: Battle-map authoring data for Frontier Town (tutorial, spine node 'start'). rev 6: WIDE-tier remake. Art via two-pass generation (Gemini flash 3.5, style ref = rev 4 art): pass 1 terrain-only (road/palisade/gates/clearings), pass 2 edit adds the town; the passes were pixel-stable outside additions, enabling composite surgery (out-of-walls caravan additions restored selectively, wide barn removed to free the inside-west slot, west camp house/cart erased to free the camp-side clearing). Sparkle removed at (946,350) 1024-space. Graded (grade B: V-gamma 0.75, sat x1.15, warm +5% -- owner-picked standard, see docs/MAP_ART_PIPELINE.md) and shipped 2x nearest-neighbor upscaled: all coordinates below are in 2048x868 shipped-pixel space (paint space was 1024x434). Grid 30x13 (~68px cells; houses ~2 cells = compressed size ladder). Road traced from the building-free pass-1 mask; through town the lane rides the road's NORTH half so units render in front of south-row rooflines -- occluders empty ON PURPOSE (route audit verified vs goblin/boss sprite heights). 8 slots hand-placed from owner markup 2026-07-12. levelDef pairing: enemySpeedMult 0.85 (~23s crossing over ~31 cells), enemyScaleMult 1.25 (map-scoped unit upsize). rev 6b (2026-07-12 owner batch): s3/s7 re-centered, s9 added far-east; props composited onto 3 unused pads; gatehouse occluders reinstated (road passes THROUGH the gates - the exception to the zero-occluder rule). rev 6c (2026-07-12 round 2): 7 slots nudged to owner arrow tips; roof-peak tip occluders added (A-frame barn, south house); floating-box prop paste reverted+redone tight on-pad; two new prop groups (yard firewood, pad barrels); title font MedievalSharp->Cinzel Bold; mist drift ~2x faster. 2026-07-14: this file is now the RUNTIME source of truth -- the drill app fetches it at boot (loadWorldData/tdInitWorldData) and the inline drill.js mirror was removed. Lane waypoints, build-slot positions and occluder rects synced from the shipped drill.js constants, which carried the #135/#138 playtested retunes (18-point lane riding the road's north half; rev 6b/6c slot nudges; tightened gatehouse-body + roof-peak-tip occluders) that had never been back-ported here. Edit THIS file to change the map; drill.js only adapts the schema (lanes[0].waypoints -> waypointsPx, buildSlots x/y -> buildSlotsPx, occluders rect -> occludersPx). 2026-07-16: occluders may be 'rect' [x0,y0,x1,y1] (axis-aligned box, compact form) OR 'poly' [[x,y],...] (3+ vertices, free shape for roof peaks / gate arches); the runtime and the ?author=1 editor handle both, and the editor converts rect->poly automatically when you insert a vertex on an edge with the occluder tool. 2026-07-16: 'pixelArt' flag added (true = renderer draws the map nearest-neighbor, right for the current 2x NN-upscaled art; set false when a high-density repaint ships so it downscales bilinear instead). The PNG's resolution is now decoupled from the coordinate space: all coordinates in this file stay in the 2048x868 viewBox space regardless of the shipped image's pixel size - a higher-res repaint is a pure image swap, no coordinate migration.

leak.landmark: east road past the caravan camp
